name: Line Chart
use_case: Show continuous data trends over time
description: Best for time-series data showing progression and trends

name: Bar Chart
description: Ideal for comparing values across categories

name: Horizontal Bar
use_case: Rankings or categories with long labels
description: Better than vertical bars when labels are long or items are ranked

name: Stacked Bar
description: Reveals part-to-whole relationships within each category

name: Grouped Bar
description: Side-by-side bars for direct multi-series comparison

name: Area Chart
use_case: Show volume or cumulative values over time
description: Filled line chart emphasizing magnitude and volume

name: Stacked Area
description: Reveals how category contributions shift over time

name: Pie Chart
description: Best limited to 5 or fewer segments for readability

name: Donut Chart
description: Pie variant with central KPI display area

name: Scatter Plot
description: Reveals relationships and clusters in two-dimensional data

name: Bubble Chart
use_case: Show three variables (x y and size)
description: Scatter extension adding a size dimension for third variable

name: Radar Chart
description: Useful for skill assessments and multi-dimension comparison

name: Heatmap
use_case: Show density patterns in matrix format
description: Grid-based color intensity for pattern discovery

name: Treemap
use_case: Show hierarchical data as proportional rectangles
description: Nested rectangles showing size and hierarchy simultaneously

name: Sunburst
use_case: Show hierarchical data as concentric rings
description: Radial treemap for hierarchical drill-down exploration

name: Funnel Chart
description: Visualize drop-off rates through sequential process stages

name: Gauge Chart
description: Dashboard KPI display showing progress toward a goal

name: Candlestick
description: Standard financial chart for open-high-low-close price data

name: Waterfall
description: Reveals how sequential values contribute to a total

name: Gantt Chart
use_case: Show project schedules and task timelines
description: Timeline bars showing task duration and dependencies

name: Sankey
description: Visualize how quantities flow and distribute between categories

name: Sparkline
use_case: Show inline trend within text or table cell
description: Tiny chart embedded in context for at-a-glance trends

name: Histogram
use_case: Show frequency distribution of continuous data
description: Bars representing frequency of values within ranges

name: Box Plot
description: Displays median quartiles and outliers for statistical comparison

name: Timeline
description: Chronological display of events along a time axis
